get.summary: Get a list of vacancies (laus störf).

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: (Optional) Filter to filter down the vacancy list.

parameters.name: rowOffset
parameters.description: (Optional) Offset for pagination. Row where to start fetching from. Negative values are clamped to 0.

parameters.name: fetchSize
parameters.description: (Optional) Fetch size for pagination. How many rows to fetch. Clamped to 1..100.

get.summary: Get a single vacancy by ID.

parameters.name: vacancyId
parameters.description: The vacancy ID to fetch details about.

get.summary:
[GET] Get a list of Employees.
This endpoint fetches data from Orri.

parameters.name: rowOffset
parameters.description: (Optional) Offset for pagination. Row where to start fetching from.

parameters.name: fetchSize
parameters.description: (Optional) Fetch size for pagination. How many rows to fetch.

get.summary:
[GET] Get a list of Employees and return only active assignments.
We still return the employee with no assignments if there are no active assignments on him.
This endpoint fetches data from Orri.

parameters.name: rowOffset
parameters.description: (Optional) Offset for pagination. Row where to start fetching from.

parameters.name: fetchSize
parameters.description: (Optional) Fetch size for pagination. How many rows to fetch.

get.summary: [GET] Basic check to see if controller is living.
[GET] Returns a paginated list of suppliers with cursor-based paging and optional search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suppliers to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string for supplier name.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for next page.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor for previous page.

get.summary: [GET] Returns a paginated list of invoice types with cursor-based paging and optional search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of invoice types to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string for invoice type name.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for next page.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor for previous page.

get.summary: [GET] Returns a paginated list of customers with cursor-based paging and optional search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of customers to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string for customer name.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for next page.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor for previous page.

get.summary: [GET] Returns a paginated list of open invoices with dimension data and cursor-based paging.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of invoices to return (default: 50, max: 100).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for next page.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Cursor for previous page.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Optional start date for filtering invoices (inclusive).

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Optional end date for filtering invoices (inclusive).

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Optional list of invoice type IDs to filter by. by. Corresponds to the supplier id returned by the /types endpoint.

parameters.name: suppliers
parameters.description: Optional list of supplier IDs to filter by. Corresponds to the supplier id returned by the /suppliers endpoint.

parameters.name: customers
parameters.description: Optional list of customer IDs to filter by. Corresponds to the customer id returned by the /customers endpoint.

post.description: Refer to the NewVacancyDto schema for field-level required flags, max lengths and formats. Business validation rules (create): openTo is optional (open-ended vacancy when omitted). If openTo is provided, it must be in the future, later than publishDate, at least 10 calendar days after publishDate, and fall on an Icelandic working day (not weekend/holiday). publishDate may be in the past. webLinkUrl must be a valid absolute HTTP/HTTPS URL and must respond successfully (2xx) when probed. Redirects (3xx) are not followed; provide the canonical URL. If salaryTerms is omitted, empty, or whitespace, it is generated from unionName using the standard kjarasamningur clause.

parameters.name: vacancyId
parameters.description: The GUID of the vacancy to deactivate.

put.description: Refer to the UpdateVacancyDto schema. Only included fields are changed, but updatedBy must always be provided. Business validation rules (update): If openTo is omitted, updates are rejected when the current vacancy deadline has already passed. If openTo is provided, it must be in the future, on an Icelandic working day, later than the effective publish date (updated value or existing value), and at least 10 calendar days after that publish date. If only publishDate is updated and an existing openTo exists, the same ordering and 10-day minimum period still apply. If webLinkUrl is provided, it must be a valid absolute HTTP/HTTPS URL and must respond successfully when probed. If salaryTerms is non-empty, it overwrites the stored value. If omitted, empty, or whitespace, the stored value is preserved — except when unionName is being changed and the stored value is the previously auto-generated kjarasamningur clause, in which case it is refreshed for the new union.

post.summary: Submit vacancy statistics after the hiring process is completed.
post.description: Required once the hiring process for the corresponding vacancy is finished. Refer to the NewVacancyStatsDto schema for required fields.

heading.description:
Gets or sets the heading.
Maps to VACANCY.FYRIRSOGN

jobTitle.description:
Gets or sets the job title.
Maps to VACANCY.STARFSHEITI
Null means this is a general application listing for the institution, not a specific job title.

jobCategory.description:
Gets or sets the job category.
Maps to VACANCY.STARFSSVID

publishDate.description:
Gets or sets the date of publishing which also serves as the start of the application period.
Maps to VACANCY.BIRTINGARDAGSETNING.

openTo.description:
Gets or sets the end of the application period.
Maps to VACANCY.UMSOKNARFRESTUR_TIL.

introduction.description:
Gets or sets the introduction.
Maps to VACANCY.INNGANGUR.

assignments.description:
Gets or sets the assignments.
Maps to VACANCY.VERKEFNI.

qualifications.description:
Gets or sets the qualifications.
Maps to VACANCY.HAEFNIKROFUR

moreInfo.description:
Gets or sets the qualifications.
Maps to VACANCY.UNDIRTEXTI

orgName.description:
Gets or sets the organization name.
Maps to VACANCY.STOFNUN_HEITI.

orgNr.description:
Gets or sets the organization number (fjárlagaliður).
Maps to VACANCY.FJARLAGALIDUR.

department.description:
Gets or sets the department.
Maps to VACANCY.SKIPULAGSEINING.

address.description:
Gets or sets the address.
Maps to VACANCY.HEIMILISFANG.

postCode.description:
Gets or sets the postal code.
Maps to VACANCY.POSTFANG.

contact1Name.description:
Gets or sets the name of contact 1.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_1_NAFN.

contact1JobTitle.description:
Gets or sets the job title of contact 1.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_1_STARFSHEITI.

contact1EmailAddress.description:
Gets or sets the email address of contact 1.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_1_NETFANG.

contact1PhoneNumber.description:
Gets or sets the phone number of contact 1.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_1_SIMANUMER.

contact2Name.description:
Gets or sets the name of contact 2.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_2_NAFN.

contact2JobTitle.description:
Gets or sets the job title of contact 2.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_2_STARFSHEITI.

contact2EmailAddress.description:
Gets or sets the email address of contact 2.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_2_NETFANG.

contact2PhoneNumber.description:
Gets or sets the phone number of contact 2.
Maps to VACANCY.TENGILIDUR_2_SIMANUMER.

webLinkUrl.description:
Gets or sets the weblink URL to the application website.
Maps to VACANCY.HLEKKUR_URL.

webLinkText.description:
Gets or sets the weblink text to the application website.
Maps to VACANCY.HLEKKUR_TEXTI.

hoursRatio.description:
Gets or sets the hours ratio.
Maps to VACANCY.STARFSHLUTFALL.

unionName.description:
Gets or sets the union name.
Maps to VACANCY.STETTARFELAG_HEITI.
Null means the job is not tied to a specific union and the applicant can choose.

salaryTerms.description:
Gets or sets the salary terms.
Maps to VACANCY.SALARY_TERMS.
If null, empty, or whitespace, the API generates the standard kjarasamningur clause based on UnionName.

logoUrl.description:
Gets or sets the logoURL.
Maps to VACANCY.LOGO_URL.

locations.description:
Gets or sets the locations.
Maps to VACANCY.STADSETNINGAR.

numberOfPositions.description:
Gets or sets the number of positions associated with the vacancy.
Maps to VACANCY.FJOLDI_STARFA.

vacancyActive.description:
Gets or sets whether the vacancy is active.
Maps to VACANCY.AUGLYSING_VIRK.

createdBy.description:
Gets or sets the user that created the vacancy.
Maps to VACANCY.CREATED_BY.

sourceSystem.description:
Gets or sets the system that created the vacancy.
Maps to VACANCY.SOURCE_SYSTEM.

sourceSystemID.description:
Gets or sets the source system ID for the vacancy.
Maps to VACANCY.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID.

NewVacancyDto.description:
Represents a data transfer object for a new entry to the VACANCY table.
Data is mapped from VACANCY in the database.

vacancyID.description:
Gets or sets the vacancy_id.
Maps to vacancy.vacancy_id_pk

meanAge.description:
The mean age of applicants.
Maps to VacancyStats.Value

numberOfApplicants.description:
The number of applicants.
Maps to VacancyStats.Value.

percentageOfMaleApplicants.description:
The percentage of male applicants.
Maps to VacancyStats.Value.

numberOfUnfinishedApplications.description:
The number of people that started an application without applying.
Maps to VacancyStats.Value.

numberOfHired.description:
The number of people hired from the vacancy.
Maps to VacancyStats.Value.

NewVacancyStatsDto.description:
Represents a data transfer object for new entries to the VacancyStats table.
Data is mapped to table VacancyStats in the database.

VacancyResponseDto.description:

tags.name: Vacancy
tags.description:
Vacancy controller, used to get information about a vacancy and lookup a group of vacancies.
Vacancy is equivalent to Laust Starf in Icelandic.
